Commit 3e9f (branch main). All ACs verified with evidence:
AC1 (.cursor/mcp.json resolves against project venv from a fresh clone): file uses ${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python — portable, no machine-specific path.
AC2 (start command launches + enumerates >=7 resources): in-memory FastMCP Client lists 7 resources; `python -m ob.mcp_server` starts over stdio with no crash (subprocess check); test TestMCPServerRegistration passes.
AC3 (README documents loading + how to confirm connected): README "MCP Server" section updated with mcp.json + verification command.
AC4 (demo.md explicit MCP verification step + expected content): pre-flight checklist MCP line + "Show it (MCP)" beat showing conventions://deprecated-apis content.
AC5 (no hardcoded absolute machine-specific path): uses ${workspaceFolder}.
Note: final Cursor-UI "connected" confirmation is a documented reload step (README + demo pre-flight); the start command itself is verified working.

Commit 5adb9c1 on main. AC1 (server registers check_workspace tool): TestMCPCheckTool::test_tool_is_registered passes (list_tools includes check_workspace). AC2 (bad -> >=4 violations, safe -> 0): test_tool_flags_bad_contrib asserts violation_count>=4 (actual 5, passed False); test_tool_passes_safe_contrib asserts 0 (passed True) — both invoked over the MCP Client's call_tool with .data. AC3 (test covers both bad+safe): yes, plus registration. AC4 (known-limitations item 7 updated): reframed to note the check tool exists. AC5 (suite green, ruff clean): 65 tests pass, ruff check + format clean.

Commit 9753f4c on main. AC1 (histogram equalization -> skimage/exposure/): test_keyword_routing + test_scaffold_routes_equalization_to_exposure pass. AC2 (edge->filters, denoising->restoration, watershed->segmentation): parametrized test_keyword_routing passes for all. AC3 ('io' no longer matches inside 'equalization'): test_io_not_matched_inside_equalization passes; word-boundary regex \\b prevents substring hits. AC4 (sensible default when no match): default_directory=skimage/filters/ in profile, used by scaffold; test_unmatched_task_returns_none confirms None->caller default. AC5 (>=5 mappings + regression covered): 6 parametrized + regression + whole-word + e2e. AC6 (ruff clean, suite green): 75 tests pass, ruff check + format clean.

Commit be01891 on main. AC1 (>=6 records w/ Context+Decision+Rationale+Alternatives): 7 ADRs, 28 sections (7x4) verified by grep. AC2 (covers deterministic CLI, MCP-as-core, ob naming, profile-driven, scikit-image-over-OpenCV, demo-script-as-spec): ADR-001..006 (+007 briefs). AC3 (scikit-image-vs-OpenCV links to battle cards): ADR-005 links to library-battle-cards.md. AC4 (README links to decisions.md): added Decisions section + file-structure entry. AC5 (no contradiction w/ known-limitations or deck): records cite known-limitations extension points consistently; aligned with deck Built/Deferred/Why.

Done + verified. ob check examples/bad-first-contrib = 5 SK-* violations; --profile profiles/diffusers.yaml = 2 DIFF-*, zero SK-*. 77 tests pass, ruff clean. Docs (demo/deck/decisions/README) narrate the swap. Default prefix stays SK so scikit-image assertions unchanged.
